descriptors.name: grain size
descriptors.rationale: fundamental microstructural length scale controlling properties

quality.notes: mean vs median choice loses distribution shape

descriptors.name: grain boundary misorientation
descriptors.physical_meaning: average crystallographic angle across grain interfaces
descriptors.rationale: indicates boundary energy and mobility characteristics

representation.notes: average misorientation angle across all boundaries

quality.notes: loses bimodal distributions and boundary network topology

descriptors.name: grain aspect ratio
descriptors.rationale: captures deformation history and directional properties

representation.notes: ratio of major to minor axis

quality.notes: texture type and symmetry information lost

descriptors.name: grain boundary density
descriptors.physical_meaning: total boundary area per unit volume
descriptors.rationale: controls diffusion pathways and stored energy

quality.loss_reason: redundant with grain size, shape factor
quality.notes: non-independent descriptor, loses grain morphology details

descriptors.name: dislocation density
descriptors.physical_meaning: line length of dislocations per volume
descriptors.rationale: determines work hardening and stored energy

quality.notes: loses dislocation type and cell structure

descriptors.name: subgrain structure
descriptors.rationale: indicates recovery state and deformation history

quality.loss_reason: subgrain size and misorientation details lost
quality.notes: binary presence loses subgrain morphology quantification

descriptors.name: stored energy
descriptors.rationale: driving force for recrystallization and recovery

representation.notes: integrated energy from defects and boundaries

quality.loss_reason: spatial distribution and source contributions lost
quality.notes: single value obscures heterogeneous energy landscape

quality.loss_reason: spatial arrangement and grain size lost
quality.notes: loses information about recrystallized grain distribution

descriptors.name: grain orientation spread
descriptors.rationale: measures plastic strain heterogeneity within grains

quality.notes: loses spatial patterns and individual grain behavior

descriptors.name: kernel average misorientation
descriptors.physical_meaning: local orientation gradient measuring deformation intensity
descriptors.rationale: spatially resolved indicator of stored strain

representation.notes: spatially averaged KAM value over microstructure

quality.loss_reason: full spatial map reduced to average
quality.notes: loses heterogeneous strain distribution and localization

descriptors.name: grain boundary character distribution
descriptors.physical_meaning: population fractions of special low-energy boundaries
descriptors.rationale: special boundaries resist cracking and corrosion

representation.notes: CSL boundary fractions up to Sigma29

quality.loss_reason: spatial connectivity and network topology lost
quality.notes: high-sigma CSL omitted, loses percolation information

descriptors.name: misorientation angle distribution
descriptors.rationale: characterizes boundary energy spectrum and texture

quality.loss_reason: axis-angle pairs reduced to scalar angle
quality.notes: one-degree binning adequate, loses misorientation axis
